name: Beth Hansen
subject: Hillary is in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, Hillary Clinton will be campaigning in Ohio today and for one simple reason: **Hillary and her allies are terrified of Gov. John Kasich**.

The latest poll shows Gov. Kasich with a 61% approval rating in Ohio and we'll need your support to ensure that we win the primary and can go on to defeat Hillary!

**No Republican has _EVER_ won the White House without winning in Ohio**. [Can you chip in $25, $50 or more right now to make it happen?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30012959:28762388904:m:1:958431888:4CB089A9A8C31EED6C675D8368D22218:r)

[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30012960:28762388904:m:1:958431888:4CB089A9A8C31EED6C675D8368D22218:r)
We have a long way to go to win the nomination and go on to face Hillary, but Gov. Kasich's message is resonating with Americans.

**Be sure to visit our website for the latest news and updates that you can share:** [JohnKasich.com/News](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30012961:28762388904:m:1:958431888:4CB089A9A8C31EED6C675D8368D22218:r)

Thanks for all that you're doing.

**Beth Hansen
**Campaign Manager

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30012962:28762388904:m:1:958431888:4CB089A9A8C31EED6C675D8368D22218:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: A day late and a dollar short
body:
Friend, we can't be a day late and a dollar short! | |

---
---
|
Friend,

**A day late and a dollar short.**

That's what we cannot afford to have happen, and that's why I'm emailing you right now.

Just five days remain in August, and I need your immediate financial support to ensure we meet our August fundraising goals by midnight on Monday.

[**Can I count on you right now, Friend? Will you please chip in $15, $25, $50 or more to help guarantee we hit our critical monthly goal?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999877:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)

| [** Donate $5 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999878:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r) | [** Donate $15 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999879:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)
---|---
[** Donate $25 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999880:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r) | [** Donate $50 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999881:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)
[** Donate $75 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999882:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r) | [** Donate $100 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999883:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)
[** Donate $250 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999884:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r) | [** Donate $500 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999885:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)

Our campaign has been going full speed all summer with dozens of town hall meetings, house parties, business tours, fairs, and parades. It's critical that we continue campaigning hard and keep our foot on the fundraising pedal. **Won't you show your support by making an instant online donation right now?**

[**Please follow this link to give as generously as you can to our campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999877:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. In order to ensure we hit our critical End of Month fundraising deadline, I need your urgent financial support by midnight on Monday. [**Will you please chip in as much as you can afford by following this link?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999877:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r) Thank you.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29999877:28763982428:m:1:877327319:18321C70B65C0C5919F234EC38DC4682:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Barry Bennett, BenCarson.com
subject: Think about this for a moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30013144:28764592221:m:1:876315805:C1522E850BD2FEEE0B72F54AFF79A785:r)
---

Peter,

August is almost over. It's been an incredible month and we've accomplished some big things together. Think about this for a moment...

With no traditional "political experience," Ben delivered a stand-out performance in his first-ever presidential debate. Ten days later, after all the dust had settled, even the _Washington Post _declared, "We can now name the winner of the GOP debate: Ben Carson."

This coincides with a big surge in Ben's poll numbers, both nationally and in early-voting states.

Not only is Ben firmly in the top tier, but in a number of swing states like Iowa he is considered the strongest general election candidate against Hillary Clinton. One poll even indicates that two-thirds of likely Republican voters would consider backing Ben -- _the highest level of support for any candidate in the field._

All the while, we have gained 700,000 new Facebook fans, signed up hundreds of thousands of new supporters, and "Students for Carson" chapters are now represented on 1,069 campuses throughout America.

**Now, I ask you to help us close out August in the strongest way possible.[You can do so right now by making a secure donation of any amount, big or small.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30013144:28764592221:m:1:876315805:C1522E850BD2FEEE0B72F54AFF79A785:r)

**As we move forward and the spotlight continues to shine brighter on Ben and our campaign, your donation will ensure that we have the necessary resources to share Ben's positive message, recruit and organize volunteers across the country, and push back against any misinformation that will inevitably follow.

Ben's incredible progress could not have been possible without you. That is not an overstatement.

You are the reason we are here, and [**I hope you will help Ben wrap up an outstanding month by making a donation today.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30013144:28764592221:m:1:876315805:C1522E850BD2FEEE0B72F54AFF79A785:r)

Thank you, and onward.
Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30013144:28764592221:m:1:876315805:C1522E850BD2FEEE0B72F54AFF79A785:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30013145:28764592221:m:1:876315805:C1522E850BD2FEEE0B72F54AFF79A785:r)
---
|
---

---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media
Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Rand Paul
subject: What if, Fellow Conservative?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

What if we don't tackle our ballooning $18.3 TRILLION debt?

What if we don't secure our borders, repeal ObamaCare, and stop Big Government politicians in BOTH parties from whittling away even more at our cherished Bill of Rights?

Fellow Conservative, if we elect another Big Government charlatan in EITHER party, I'm afraid our country is going to experience the disastrous answers to these questions.

So today, with the critical August 31st End of Month deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on your most generous financial support to help me take the "Next Step."

**[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017895:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, thanks to your support, you and I have already seen many big successes during my campaign for President.

First, you and I burst out of the gates posting poll numbers leading Hillary Clinton in five key swing states President Obama won in both 2008 and 2012\.

Then, we forced the NSA's outrageous and unconstitutional domestic spying programs to expire -- even in the face of outrage from spy state apologists in BOTH parties.

I unveiled my massive Fair and Flat Tax Plan to blow up our tax code, start over, return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years and create at least 1.4 million new jobs.

Then, you and I forced Members of the U.S. Senate to vote on finally DEFUNDING Planned Parenthood so the American people can clearly see who stands with them, and who stands with the radical abortionists who abort unborn babies, dismember them and sell their body parts for profit!

And, I faced down perhaps the biggest spy state apologist of them all during the first presidential debate in my full-throated defense of the Constitution's Fourth Amendment!

Grassroots energy is high everywhere I go.

But now is when the rubber meets the road.

Now is when I need to turn that grassroots energy into an unstoppable political force ready to catapult my campaign to the Republican nomination for President!

Fellow Conservative, I didn't run for the U.S. Senate on an ego trip, because I wanted a new job or some high-powered insider hack thought I might make a good candidate.

I ran because I feared for the future of my country.

I don't want our country to experience any more pain from years upon years of Big Government policies.

But I know that's what's in store for us if we nominate yet another fake conservative.

Fellow Conservative, I ran as an apologetic Tea Party candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2010.

I've done something most politicians don't. I've delivered. I've fought the status quo with everything I have as a U.S. Senator.

Now, I'm taking the next step and running for President as an unapologetic defender of liberty and limited government.

**[But I'm counting on you to help me win](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017895:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, this month's Next Step Fundraising Blitz is critical -- not just because reporters and political "experts" are sniffing around my campaign to see if I can really mobilize the grassroots support necessary to win.

It's critical because to build the on-the-ground campaign presence I need to win, I need to pay for all the campaign stops, phone banks, bumper stickers, pizza for volunteers and TV ads.

**[So will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017895:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r)**?

Then, will you **[forward this email](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=5223102&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=b43e10886738b5dd13821b5cec1e48dd)** to everyone you know and ask them to please give as generously as possible to my Next Step Fundraising Blitz right away?

Your support will make a massive impact. So please act at once!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017895:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017896:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017897:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30017898:28770477536:m:1:879035888:820EDBEFF0F27C00128E75A5750E0E95:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is9AEvImNx). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os9AEvImNx)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os9AEvImNx) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28770477536-echo3-6641B9F18FFF73A5A70E2305336F3904@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Colleen
subject: FW: deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter,
The governor emailed me early this morning specifically asking for your help before the end of the month.
Governor Walker is traveling all across the country and hearing the same message everywhere from conservatives like you: the American people are fed up with Washington and are ready for a true conservative to take on the establishment the same way he did in Wisconsin.
We need your help to keep sharing our message of fighting and winning against the left-wing special interests.
[**Please contribute $35, $75, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 right away so I can respond to the governor letting him know you have his back.**](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzNjYwNjMS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNjMxNzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you Peter,
Colleen

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Governor Walker
Date: Thu, Aug 27, 2015 at 6:09 AM
Subject: deadline
To: Colleen Coyle
Colleen, I don't seem to have Peter Willis's email address in my contacts. Will you please send them a message asking for an urgent contribution before the end of the month? They have supported us in the past and I know we can count on their support now.
Let me know as soon as you hear from Peter.
Thanks!
Sent from my iPhone
| | Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.
[www.ScottWalker.com](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMzNjYwNjMS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNjMxNzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This email was sent by: Scott Walker Inc.
P.O. Box 620590, Middleton, WI 53562

Governor Walker is traveling all across the country and hearing the same message everywhere from conservatives like you: the American people are fed up with Washington and are ready for a true conservative to take on the establishment the same way he did in Wisconsin. We need your help to keep sharing our message of fighting and winning against the left-wing special interests. Thank you Peter, Colleen \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Governor Walker Date: Thu, Aug 27, 2015 at 6:09 AM Subject: deadline To: Colleen Coyle Colleen, I don't seem to have Peter Willis's email address in my contacts. Will you please send them a message asking for an urgent contribution before the end of the month? They have supported us in the past and I know we can count on their support now. Let me know as soon as you hear from Peter. Thanks! Sent from my iPhone | | Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.

name: George Pataki
subject: Stop Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/aec628c0ae/sc=827eb
Friend,

You may have recently heard about Donald Trump's immigration plan.

Trump aims to use the full force of the United States government to
deport 12 million immigrants who go to our schools, work on our
farms, attend our churches, and live in our neighborhoods.

It's not just impractical. It's un-American.

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/817cafac24
Click here to watch me discuss Trump's ridiculous plan on Morning
Joe.

If you agree that we cannot allow Trump to represent the Republican
brand in 2016, -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/372a8a740c/sc=827eb please join our campaign with a $10, $25, $50, or $100 contribution
today.

Trump's plan more resembles Stalin's Soviet Union than Reagan's
shining city on a hill.

Of course people who have broken our laws should pay the
consequences. It's why as Governor I reduced crime in New York and
turned it from the most dangerous state in America to the fourth
safest.

Trump's plan, though, isn't about crime. It's about getting
attention and being a demagogue.

But we need your support to get our message out. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/7b9952cc2f/sc=827eb Your contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 will help us stop Trump's
ridiculous crusade.

I am the only candidate running for president who can win enough
conservative, Republican, Hispanic, and Reagan Democrat votes to
defeat the Obama-Clinton machine in 2016.

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/997ff77c12/sc=827eb That's why I'm asking you to join our team with a $10, $25, $50, or
$100 contribution right now.

Thank you,

George Pataki

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/5a8f50a25f/sc=827eb

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/dbf0c12a89

______________________________________________________________________
Click to view this email in a browser
http://hosted.verticalresponse.com/1453469/7b6a06f552/545562933/ace65cf3c9/

If you no longer wish to receive these emails, please reply to this
message with "Unsubscribe" in the subject line or simply click on the
following link:

http://cts.vresp.com/u?7b6a06f552/ace65cf3c9/mlpftw

______________________________________________________________________

Pataki for President
132 East 43rd Street #614
New York, New York 10017

name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm not going to take it anymore. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Are we going to give up our freedom? Will we allow the constant trampling of our liberties?

That's exactly what the Big Government crowd in Washington expects you to do.

They believe you and I will just sit back, shrug our shoulders and give up.

But Fellow Conservative, I've drawn my line in the sand -- and I'm NOT going to take it anymore.

**[Will you stand with me in my fight to destroy the Washington Machine by chipping in $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)**?

My campaign put together a video from a floor speech I gave the day you helped me force the NSA's outrageous and unconstitutional domestic spying programs to expire.

During that speech, I stood up and boldly declared to the Washington Machine that I was NOT going to take it anymore.

Please take a moment and **[watch the video](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)** , and then let me know you're not going to take it anymore by chipping in a contribution today.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)

Since I launched my campaign in April, I've taken my message of individual liberty and freedom across the country.

And Fellow Conservative, let me tell you -- the grassroots energy is high everywhere I go.

But September is when the "rubber meets the road."

And with the August 31st end of the month deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on your immediate help.

**[Will you stand with me by chipping in a generous contribution of $20.16 before the August 31st deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)**?

This month's Next Step Fundraising Blitz is critical.

Reporters and political "experts" are sniffing around my campaign to see if I can really mobilize the grassroots support necessary to win.

Your contribution will help show them that the American people have had enough, and refuse to sit back and just "take it."

But that's not all.

Your generous contribution will also help my campaign build the massive grassroots force necessary to destroy the Washington Machine and take our country back.

It'll help my campaign open multiple offices in key early Primary states . . .

For travel and campaign stops to get my message out across the country . . .

For TV and radio ads, phone banks and door-to-door canvassing operations, and . . .

For bumper stickers, yard signs, and volunteer operations.

**[So will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)**?

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024586:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024587:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024588:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024589:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024585:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024590:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024591:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30024592:28777384031:m:1:879035888:44496619DED4EAD23AB880057E12E604:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Mandi Karp
subject: they are scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend -- why is the National Republican Senatorial Committee attacking now?

Could be because our race is ranked one of the top ten in the country.

Could be because Patrick scares the living daylights out of them. The NRSC knows as well as we do that he's got what it takes to win. (And you can help [**with a contribution**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d9/738133e4/3ad5eccd/7f9689ce/2448902600/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827pm?refcode=pme150827pm_m&recurring=true")).

The bottom line is -- the NRSC is in this race now. It's attacking and we need to fight back. [**And we can 't do that unless we reach our $25,000 Year Out from the Primary goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d9/738133e4/3ad5eccd/7f9689ce/2448902600/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827pm?refcode=pme150827pm_m&recurring=true")

[**We only have 3 days to raise the last $10,000 we need to reach $25,000. Can you contribute right now?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d9/738133e4/3ad5eccd/7f9689ce/2448902600/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827pm?refcode=pme150827pm_m&recurring=true")

Floridians don't need the NRSC telling them who to vote for. **Of course, that 's not going to stop the NRSC.**

It's also not going to stop us from fighting against them.

Friend, you are our first and best line of defense against groups like these. And we need your help right now.

[_**Make your contribution today. Even $5 or $10 will get us closer to our goal.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d9/738133e4/3ad5eccd/7f9689ce/2448902600/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827pm?refcode=pme150827pm_m&recurring=true")

I'll keep you updated. In the meantime, thanks for all of your help.

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Friends of Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d9/738133e4/3ad5eccd/7f9689cf/2448902600/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d9/738133e4/3ad5eccd/7f9689c9/2448902600/VEsB/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Restoring Liberty in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The American people are sick of being lied to
and misled by faux conservative chameleons out looking for votes.

They're searching for a real champion who
they can trust to follow through with their campaign promises to
stand up and fight for individual liberty and constitutional
government.

I am that candidate.

I've defeated the Washington Machine before
-- and I've got the record and the message to take them on and
defeat them again.

But with the August 31st end of the month
deadline rapidly approaching -- I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE
support.

If I'm going to defeat the Washington Machine
and take our country back, it's going to take a grassroots army
of freedom-loving Patriots standing in my corner with me.

Will you stand with me and fight the
Washington Machine by chipping in a generous contribution of
$20.16 to my campaign?

Six years ago, I went to Washington to put an
end to the Washington Machine's corruption that is trampling our
freedoms and bankrupting our children and grandchildren.

I've done something most politicians haven't.

I've delivered.

I've fought the status quo with everything I
have as a U.S. Senator.

Today I'm taking the next step and running
for President as an unapologetic defender of liberty and limited
government.

Fellow Conservative, I need to know that you're with me.

According to most experts and political
pundits, September is when the "rubber meets the road" for the
Republican presidential campaigns.

So your support before the August 31st end of
month deadline is critical.

Please chip in a generous contribution of
$20.16 to help me take a sledge hammer to the Washington Machine.

Thank you for your generous support. It
means the world to me.

Chip in $10
immediately >>

Chip in $25
immediately >>

Chip in $50
immediately >>

Chip in $100
immediately >>

Or donate another
amount >>

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23ff/43f17890/5a466fb5/621d1969/2403448840/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23ff/43f17890/5a466fb5/621d1917/2403448840/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: déjà vu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

It's happening all over again. Ted Cruz is trying to steer us toward another government shutdown--this time to defund Planned Parenthood. Only now he won't even own up to it.

Check out this _Washington Post_ headline from Tuesday: **" Ted Cruz: If the government shuts down over my Planned Parenthood funding fight, it's not my fault"** That's just unbelievable. We can't let reckless and irresponsible legislators like Cruz hold our government hostage just so they can wage their numbskull attacks on women and working families. It's time we stand together and say enough is enough!

I promise to lead the fight to stop them -- just like I've done before -- but I'm going to need your help. This is a critical moment in our campaign because once the summer ends, things will really start to heat up. We've got to be ready, and that means having all the resources necessary to fight back against Tea Party extremists when they set their sights on Maryland.
**[Will you contribute now, before the end-of-month deadline on August 31? I need your support today to continue standing up for our shared values in the Senate.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f52/70cdc2ba/47a504b5/39510ed/2968309116/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082715nd&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+contribute+now+before+the+endof&utm_campaign=em082715&source=em082715")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f52/70cdc2ba/47a504b5/39510e7/2968309116/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em082715nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em082715&source=em082715")** **[Donate $15 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f52/70cdc2ba/47a504b5/39510ff/2968309116/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em082715nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+15+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em082715&source=em082715")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f52/70cdc2ba/47a504b5/39510f3/2968309116/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em082715nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em082715&source=em082715")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f52/70cdc2ba/47a504b5/3951087/2968309116/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082715nd&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em082715&source=em082715")** When Cruz caused a shutdown two years ago in a misguided attempt to defund the Affordable Care Act, **I led the fight on the House floor to get our government back up and running.** And if Cruz and his Tea Party allies try again, **I 'll be right there fighting back every step of the way.**

We've got to have real leadership in the U.S. Senate to counter Tea Party numbskulls like Ted Cruz, and I want to be there working hard for Marylanders to actually get things done. But I simply can't win without your help.

**[Please consider a donation today--before the deadline hits in just 4 days. Believe me, any amount will make a difference!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f52/70cdc2ba/47a504b5/3951099/2968309116/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em082715nd&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Please+consider+a+donation+todaymdashbef&utm_campaign=em082715&source=em082715")**

Thanks for your generosity and support,

Chris Van Hollen
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Christina Reynolds, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: The GOP attacks on Hillary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Help us end this month strong. | Friend --

I'm an opposition researcher by trade -- I've watched every Republican from Pat Buchanan to Newt Gingrich to Jeb Bush take shots at Hillary Clinton, and let me tell you, she shakes it off better than anyone I've ever seen. (This is not a skill that comes naturally to most folks: Look how quickly Donald Trump gets annoyed any time someone asks him a tough question.)

Hillary can take it -- but she needs your help. That's why we've set a goal of 20,000 grassroots donations before the end of this month.

**[Pitch in $1 or more before Monday to help fight back against the Republicans and their campaign against Hillary.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMzNzA4NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNjYxMzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Our opponents know what a strong candidate Hillary is, and trust me, they are deathly afraid of her. That's why over the past few weeks, you've seen those attacks really ramp up. They're going to do everything they can to make an attack stick now, because they know that if this election is a debate about policies and ideas, they're going to get crushed.

This is going to be a long campaign, and there are going to be more attacks hurled our way. We can handle them, but we've got to be able to respond.

**Pitch in $1 or more, and let’s go win:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/august-deadline/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMzNzA4NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNjYxMzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Director of Rapid Response
Hillary for America

---

Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzNzA4NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNjYxMzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzNzA4NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNjYxMzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzNzA4NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNjYxMzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMzNzA4NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNjYxMzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
